'''鈭歯g-th-l''' ('''ngathala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lumberjack|lumberjack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lumberjack|lumberjack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| ngathala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngathalithi|ngathalithi]] || [[word:ngathaliji|ngathaliji]] || [[word:ngathalishi|ngathalishi]] || [[word:ngathali|ngathali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathaluthuth|ngathaluthuth]] || [[word:ngathalujuj|ngathalujuj]] || [[word:ngathalushush|ngathalushush]] || [[word:ngathal|ngathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathaluthu|ngathaluthu]] || [[word:ngathaluju|ngathaluju]] || [[word:ngathalushu|ngathalushu]] || [[word:ngathalu|ngathalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathalufuth|ngathalufuth]] || [[word:ngathalufuj|ngathalufuj]] || [[word:ngathalufush|ngathalufush]] || [[word:ngathaluf|ngathaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngathalethe|ngathalethe]] || [[word:ngathaleje|ngathaleje]] || [[word:ngathaleshe|ngathaleshe]] || [[word:ngathale|ngathale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathalothoth|ngathalothoth]] || [[word:ngathalojoj|ngathalojoj]] || [[word:ngathaloshosh|ngathaloshosh]] || [[word:ngathal|ngathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathalotho|ngathalotho]] || [[word:ngathalojo|ngathalojo]] || [[word:ngathalosho|ngathalosho]] || [[word:ngathalo|ngathalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathalofoth|ngathalofoth]] || [[word:ngathalofoj|ngathalofoj]] || [[word:ngathalofosh|ngathalofosh]] || [[word:ngathalof|ngathalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngathal忙th忙|ngathal忙th忙]] || [[word:ngathal忙j忙|ngathal忙j忙]] || [[word:ngathal忙sh忙|ngathal忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngathal忙|ngathal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathalathath|ngathalathath]] || [[word:ngathalajaj|ngathalajaj]] || [[word:ngathalashash|ngathalashash]] || [[word:ngathal|ngathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathalatha|ngathalatha]] || [[word:ngathalaja|ngathalaja]] || [[word:ngathalasha|ngathalasha]] || [[word:ngathala|ngathala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathalafath|ngathalafath]] || [[word:ngathalafaj|ngathalafaj]] || [[word:ngathalafash|ngathalafash]] || [[word:ngathalaf|ngathalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngathalasha|ngathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongathalasha|gongathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingathalasha|gokingathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngathaln眉sha|ngathaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongathalnkn眉sha|gongathalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingathaln眉sha|gokingathaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngathalsh毛sha|ngathalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongathalnksh毛sha|gongathalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingathalsh毛sha|gokingathalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngathalrosha|ngathalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongathalnkrosha|gongathalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingathalrosha|gokingathalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathalmusha|ngathalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathalnkmusha|gongathalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathalmusha|gokingathalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngathalsherasha|ngathalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongathalnksherasha|gongathalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingathalsherasha|gokingathalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngathalngasha|ngathalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongathalnkngasha|gongathalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingathalngasha|gokingathalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngathalyasha|ngathalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongathalnkyasha|gongathalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingathalyasha|gokingathalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngathalyamasha|ngathalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongathalnkyamasha|gongathalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingathalyamasha|gokingathalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngathaln眉sh毛sha|ngathaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongathalnkn眉sh毛sha|gongathalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingathaln眉sh毛sha|gokingathaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngathaln眉rosha|ngathaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongathalnkn眉rosha|gongathalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingathaln眉rosha|gokingathaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathaln眉musha|ngathaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathalnkn眉musha|gongathalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathaln眉musha|gokingathaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngathalsh毛n眉sha|ngathalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongathalnksh毛n眉sha|gongathalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingathalsh毛n眉sha|gokingathalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngathalsh毛rosha|ngathalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongathalnksh毛rosha|gongathalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingathalsh毛rosha|gokingathalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathalsh毛musha|ngathalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathalnksh毛musha|gongathalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathalsh毛musha|gokingathalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngathalron眉sha|ngathalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongathalnkron眉sha|gongathalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingathalron眉sha|gokingathalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngathalrosh毛sha|ngathalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongathalnkrosh毛sha|gongathalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingathalrosh毛sha|gokingathalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathalromusha|ngathalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathalnkromusha|gongathalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathalromusha|gokingathalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngathalmun眉sha|ngathalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongathalnkmun眉sha|gongathalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingathalmun眉sha|gokingathalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngathalmush毛sha|ngathalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongathalnkmush毛sha|gongathalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingathalmush毛sha|gokingathalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngathalmurosha|ngathalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongathalnkmurosha|gongathalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingathalmurosha|gokingathalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngathal|ngathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙th忙l|ng忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongathal|hongathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙th忙l|hong忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongathal|hohongathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙th忙l|hohong忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngathal|n眉ngathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙th忙l|n眉ng忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngathal|n眉n眉ngathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙th忙l|n眉n眉ng忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngathal|n茂ngathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙th忙l|n茂ng忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngathal|n茂n茂ngathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙th忙l|n茂n茂ng忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungathal|lungathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙th忙l|lung忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungathal|lulungathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙th忙l|lulung忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingathal|lingathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙th忙l|ling忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingathal|lilingathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙th忙l|liling忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongathal|kongathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙th忙l|kong忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongathal|kokongathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙th忙l|kokong忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengathal|kengathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙th忙l|keng忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengathal|kekengathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙th忙l|kekeng忙th忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
